titles.title: Are You Washed By The Water Of The Word

properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Do you know what it is Not to have one guilty feeling Not to wonder where you're going when you die? Not condemned of the past, Not afraid of what tomorrow holds in store And know the reason why?

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Are you washed by the water Washed by the water of the word? Are you washed by the water Washed by the water of the word?

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Yes that's just how it is When you go down in the water 'Cause by faith you believe In what you heard It's no impossible dream You can start over clean When you're washed By the water of the Word

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: It's like being born again With a whole new life to live Never having to look back To what you've been Cause according to the Lord, You've just started your existence And where He's concerned There never was a sin

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: For when God looks your way He no longer sees a sinner But a saint who's been washed White as snow Not by anything we've done But by the blood of God's own Son Are you washed By the water of the Word?
